name: ai-voice-cover
description: AI Voice Cover - 人声分离 + 声音转换 + 混合输出

scripts.dev:backend: cd .venv && source bin/activate && cd .. && uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.build:sidecar: bash -c 'SIDECAr_DIR=src-tauri/sidecar && rm -rf $SIDECAr_DIR && mkdir -p $SIDECAr_DIR && cp scripts/sidecar-launcher.py scripts/requirements.txt scripts/requirements-ml.txt $SIDECAr_DIR/ && cp -r backend $SIDECAr_DIR/ && mkdir -p $SIDECAr_DIR/frontend-vue && cp -r frontend-vue/dist $SIDECAr_DIR/frontend-vue/dist && echo Sidecar prepared'
